mapper.select:
SELECT b.bug_id AS bugId, b.execution_id AS executionId, b.title AS title, b.bug_type_code AS bugTypeCode, b.severity_code AS severityCode, b.priority_code AS priorityCode, b.bug_status_code AS bugStatusCode, b.found_version AS foundVersion, b.test_env AS testEnv, b.description AS description, b.actual_result AS actualResult, b.reproduce_step AS reproduceStep, b.expected_result AS expectedResult, b.assignee_id AS assigneeId, b.reporter_id AS reporterId, TO_CHAR(b.occurred_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS occurredAtText, b.created_at AS createdAt, b.updated_at AS updatedAt,
t.test_id AS testId, t.title AS testName,
pv.version_id AS versionId, pv.version_name AS versionName,
p.project_id AS projectId, p.project_name AS projectName,
assignee.user_name AS assigneeName, reporter.user_name AS reporterName
FROM bug b JOIN test_execution te ON b.execution_id = te.execution_id JOIN test_case_mapping tcm ON te.mapping_id = tcm.mapping_id JOIN test t ON tcm.test_id = t.test_id JOIN project_version pv ON t.version_id = pv.version_id JOIN project p ON pv.project_id = p.project_id
LEFT JOIN users assignee ON b.assignee_id = assignee.user_id LEFT JOIN users reporter ON b.reporter_id = reporter.user_id
WHERE b.bug_id = #{bugId}
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'BUG_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_' || LPAD( NVL(( SELECT MAX(TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(bug_id, -4))) + 1 FROM bug WHERE bug_id LIKE 'BUG_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_%' ), 1), 4, '0' ) FROM dual
INSERT INTO bug ( bug_id, execution_id, title, bug_type_code, severity_code, priority_code, bug_status_code, found_version, test_env, description, actual_result, reproduce_step, expected_result, assignee_id, reporter_id, occurred_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{bugId}, #{executionId}, #{title}, #{bugTypeCode}, #{severityCode}, #{priorityCode}, #{bugStatusCode}, #{foundVersion}, #{testEnv}, #{description}, #{actualResult}, #{reproduceStep}, #{expectedResult}, #{assigneeId}, #{reporterId}, TO_DATE(#{occurredAtText}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE bug SET title = #{title}, bug_type_code = #{bugTypeCode}, severity_code = #{severityCode}, priority_code = #{priorityCode}, bug_status_code = #{bugStatusCode}, found_version = #{foundVersion}, test_env = #{testEnv}, description = #{description}, actual_result = #{actualResult}, reproduce_step = #{reproduceStep}, expected_result = #{expectedResult}, assignee_id = #{assigneeId}, occurred_at = TO_DATE(#{occurredAtText}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE bug_id = #{bugId}

UPDATE bug SET title = #{title}, bug_type_code = #{bugTypeCode}, severity_code = #{severityCode}, priority_code = #{priorityCode}, bug_status_code = #{bugStatusCode}, found_version = #{foundVersion}, test_env = #{testEnv}, description = #{description}, actual_result = #{actualResult}, reproduce_step = #{reproduceStep}, expected_result = #{expectedResult}, assignee_id = #{assigneeId}, occurred_at = TO_DATE(#{occurredAtText}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), updated_at = SYSDATE WHERE bug_id = #{bugId} AND reporter_id = #{loginUserId}
mapper.select:
SELECT te.execution_id AS executionId,
t.test_id AS testId, t.title AS testName, t.assignee_id AS assigneeId,
assignee.user_name AS assigneeName,
pv.version_id AS versionId, pv.version_name AS versionName,
p.project_id AS projectId, p.project_name AS projectName
FROM test_execution te JOIN test_case_mapping tcm ON te.mapping_id = tcm.mapping_id JOIN test t ON tcm.test_id = t.test_id JOIN project_version pv ON t.version_id = pv.version_id JOIN project p ON pv.project_id = p.project_id LEFT JOIN users assignee ON t.assignee_id = assignee.user_id
WHERE te.execution_id = #{executionId}
